created_at.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the response was created.

model.description: The model used to generate the response.

status.description:
The status of the response generation. One of completed,
failed, in_progress, or incomplete.

output.description:
An array of content items generated by the model. Can
include messages, function calls, web search calls,
file search calls, computer actions, and reasoning items.

error.description: An error object if the response generation failed.

incomplete_details.description: Details about why the response is incomplete.

instructions.description: The instructions provided for the response.

previous_response_id.description: The ID of the previous response in the conversation.

tools.description: The tools available during response generation.
